title: TDD Red Green Refactor with Python
summary: Practice a simple RED GREEN REFACTOR loop in Python with a tiny shipping fee function and executable tests.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Python 3.9.6 on macOS. Verified behavior covers the first passing standard case, threshold free shipping, premium free shipping, negative subtotal rejection, bool subtotal rejection, unknown tier rejection, and the just-below-threshold boundary.
